Bash(python3 -c "
import csv, re
with open\('SteamGames.csv', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    reader = csv.reader\(f\)
    next\(reader\)
    for row in reader:
        name = row[0].strip\(\)
        if re.search\(r'[\\u4e00-\\u9fff\\u3000-\\u303f\\uff00-\\uffef]', name\):
            print\(name\)
")
